## What & why

Briefly describe the change and the motivation. Link any related issue (`Closes #…`).

## Type

- [ ] feat
- [ ] fix
- [ ] refactor
- [ ] docs
- [ ] test
- [ ] chore / ci

## Changes

- 

## Checklist

- [ ] `pnpm type-check` passes (strict, no `any`)
- [ ] `pnpm test` passes (added/updated tests for the change)
- [ ] `pnpm build` succeeds
- [ ] `pnpm format` applied
- [ ] Touched only the package(s) this PR is about; Zod contracts in `packages/shared` stay the source of truth
- [ ] No secrets committed (only `.env.example`); env-only configuration
- [ ] Docs/CHANGELOG updated if behavior or config changed

## Screenshots / notes

For UI or email changes, include before/after (light + dark where relevant).
